creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 159143
patch to update QGIS to 2.10.1

- Update to version 2.10.1
- reintegrate USES=iconv:wchar_t
- remove dependency on graphics/gdal-grass, see bug #201483


===========================
bug #201483 for QGIS 2.10.0 is obsolete now and can be remove without a commit.
===========================


Poudriere logs are attached for HEAD (default, all options enabled; all options disabled), 10.1 (default options enabled) and 9.3 (default options enabled).

portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
